title: Vanilla-suppress: non-goods check lots leak (client half left)
desc: 🟠 LIVE DEFECT — root cause CONFIRMED (other agent, 2026-07-23), supersedes the earlier shop-weapon-slot hypothesis. Non-goods checks (weapon/armor/talisman/gem-ash) could hand out their VANILLA ware alongside the AP item: the goods lot-blank repoints slots at apPlaceholderGoods (a GOODS row) so it only neutralizes GOODS slots; non-goods wares fell to the id-keyed checkItemFlags suppressor, which only fires if the detour sees the AddItem AND the flag isn’t already collected — so enemy / scarab / scripted overworld drops LEAKED (repros: Ash of War: Lightning Ram 540310, Ornamental Straight Sword 510030). ✅ APWORLD HALF SHIPPED: gen_data now collects the non-goods slots of each check lot into CHECK_LOT_ZERO_MAP / CHECK_LOT_ZERO_ENEMY, emitted via new contract keys checkLotZeroMap / checkLotZeroEnemy — 1013 non-goods checks (978 map + 35 enemy), flagged one-time lots only so zeroing never eats a farmable source; id-keyed suppressor stays armed as backstop for lotless ESD/EMEVD-award checks. 🔧 CLIENT HALF REMAINING: check_lots.rs must read checkLotZeroMap (ItemLotParam_map) + checkLotZeroEnemy (ItemLotParam_enemy) and set lotItemId0X=0 + lotItemNum0X=0 per listed slot (same loop as blank-map, zero instead of repoint). After that + a client rebuild the class stops double-dipping regardless of grant path or flag timing.

title: Randomize shop weapon slots
desc: ⭐ Fixes the vanilla-suppress leak (see Blocked: 'Vanilla-suppress: a class still leaks'). SHOP_CTD was EXONERATED, so weapon→non-weapon shop rewrites are safe — but today a weapon slot holding a non-weapon reward falls back to vanilla-sell (client SHOP_CTD_GUARD in shop_sell.rs) and hands over the vanilla weapon. Task: (1) client — let a weapon row rewrite natively to ANY reward, dropping the vanilla-sell fallback; (2) apworld — delete the now-obsolete fill guard features/weapon_shop_slots.py + tests/test_gf_weapon_shop_slots.py that pins weapon slots to own-world weapons. Verify in-game: a weapon slot with a non-weapon/foreign reward sells + grants the real item, no vanilla leak, no CTD.

title: Key-item obtained flags set
desc: ✅ FIXED: the grant path now sets the vanilla 'obtained' flag (e.g. Rold = 400001) alongside the item, so vanilla event logic that reads the flag fires.

title: Shadow Keep church-basement grace — fixed
desc: ✅ FIXED: warping into the DLC Shadow Keep church-basement grace is no longer lethal (grace-ground / PlayArea-volume work). Was a documented DLC known-issue.

title: Natural-like progression mode
desc: ⭐ Build-ready (spec + DAG both exist). A mode that gates each region on its legible vanilla key so the player advances through the SPINE in a vanilla-like order — the Threshold Rule: 'enter, then resolve on a capstone boss gated by a real key.' SPEC: docs/history/SPEC-region-capstone-model-20260708.md + WIRING-region-capstone-v0.2.md §1 (dependency DAG, tasks #3–#10). DAG: the lock-chain linearized by features/scaling.py region_sphere (SPINE order == sphere gradient). Primitives are Done (region-spine + legible key-named locks). Task: an option that arranges the capstone locks into the DAG's topological order → natural route; verify with gen-sweep + region-gate tests. Scope: controls progression ORDER only — SCALING stays spheres-based (owned by nr-chain / completion-scaling), not this mode.

title: Boss-name description layer (MopWater)
desc: ⭐ First code task for MopWater. Fill _BOSS_NAMES at gen_data.py:574 — join boss_reward_lots.BOSS_REWARD_DEFEAT (drop→defeat flag) ∘ boss_healthbars.BOSS_HEALTHBARS (defeat flag→name) in desc_sources.py. Zero fill risk; provable in tests/test_gf_location_desc.py. Human part = checking joined names against real boss drops (his department) + deleting every now-redundant hand row in location_descriptions.tsv.

title: auto_equip wiring (MopWater — RE/client slice)
desc: ⭐ Contributor slice offered to MopWater — the RE/client counterpart to the boss-name task. On grant, equip the item into its slot. RE groundwork done: player-data anchors mapped (ChrAsm PGD+0x39C/0x3A0) and the SpEffect-to-player primitive already exists (from no_equip_load). Remaining = wire it in the Rust client — resolve the equip slot + write via the mapped anchors, guard bad states; verify in-game. Client repo (from-software-archipelago-clients), Windows/cargo.

title: Region-spine surgery
desc: ✅ BUILT: first-class locks for Limgrave/Mountaintops/Snowfield/Haligtree/Underground + Dragonbarrow folded into Caelid. Landed.

title: Legible key-named locks
desc: ✅ BUILT: synthetic locks renamed to their vanilla key (Altus→Dectus, Mountaintops→Rold, Haligtree Secret Medallion, Raya→Academy Glintstone Key). Retires the natural-key mechanism.

title: Boss locks v0.1 — dropped
desc: ⛔ DROPPED / out of scope (2026-07-23): the sweep-gate boss-lock model is descoped and closed. Was half-built (reference items never created, gate inert); not being finished.

title: slot_data.py extraction
desc: ✅ DONE: fill_slot_data (~the whole client contract) moved out of __init__ into a SlotDataMixin; byte-identical slot_data vs baseline.

title: Completion scaling wire
desc: 🔧 regionSphereTargetRanges emitted in play_region/100 space; client resolves /100. 2026-07-23: intra-fold vanilla-delta sphere wire landed + data regenerated (test_gf_scaling_sphere.py). In-game scaling confirmation still pending.

title: Goal-send impl
desc: goal.rs + core wiring IMPLEMENTED — pending verification (cargo test + gen-test + a multiworld smoke run confirming the slot actually completes).

title: In-client connect overlay
desc: imgui Server/Slot/Password form BUILT GREEN; real InputBlocker now wired EVERYWHERE except the game main-menu / Connection screen (the one that populates apconfig.json), which still leaks keys. Residual = block the main-menu connection screen.

title: num_regions DLC ride-along
desc: ✅ DONE: the DLC regions ride along as warp-in lock gates instead of being sealed off; gen-tested. [marquee mode]

title: Replay guard for upgrade features
desc: ✅ DONE (verified 2026-07-23): both knobs now have behavioral tests — test_gf_auto_upgrade_echo.py (auto_upgrade → slot_data echo) + test_gf_filler_economy_floor.py (filler floor derives from flatten_regular_upgrades), plus the contract-path test. No longer zero-coverage.

title: dlc_only base-lock leak + runes
desc: ✅ DONE: dlc_only pulls the BASE region locks via inject=False (no more dead placements) and the great-rune count follows.

title: Natural-key triggers — superseded
desc: ✅ MOOTED: superseded by the legible key-named locks (now Done), which retired the natural-key mechanism. Not built; won't be.

title: Gelmir rebucket
desc: ✅ DONE: Gelmir split to its own play_region 63001 (not Altus 63000); area_ids filled.

title: ⭐⭐ v0.2 — SHIPPED
desc: ✅ SHIPPED: v0.2 is tagged and public — current public release is 0.2.7 (apworld + client). The marquee P0 is off the board: the first public Elden Ring Archipelago release is out. ⚠️ the game id is "Elden Ring" (not EldenRing) — the #1 likely support question.

title: Wire shop_rows.tsv into gen_data
desc: ✅ DONE (confirmed 2026-07-23): the 702-row purchase wire is in gen_data — checks keyed to each ShopLineupParam stock flag, region ground-truth guard (SystemExit on an unknown label), shop_data.py emission. Renumbers AP ids (invalidated existing seeds); shipped as its own release.

title: In-game validation debt
desc: ✅ CLEARED for v0.2: the save-load region-latch, reconnect flag-poll baseline, and AP-only payout are confirmed on real hardware (v0.2 shipped public 0.2.7). One residual live defect tracked separately — see 'Vanilla-suppress: a class still leaks' in Blocked.

title: Region front-door latch
desc: ✅ CONFIRMED: losing a region's grace at the front door no longer strands you; save-load confirmed on hardware in the v0.2 validation sweep.

title: Option matrix SLIM v0.2
desc: ✅ SHIPPED in v0.2 (public 0.2.7): 56 → 19 player-facing options via defaults.FROZEN_OPTIONS. ZERO client churn (the frozen values still flow through slot_data). The single biggest legibility win for the first public release.

title: DeathLink keep-runes
desc: ✅ CONFIRMED: incoming-DeathLink death keeps your runes (snapshot → zero → restore, 5-tick reassert). Built + playtested in the v0.2 validation sweep.

title: curated_fill (region locks → priority)
desc: ✅ DONE: Region Locks are priority placements. NB: big-ticket is FULLY PURGED — name and all (progression_surface_set() / on_surface replaced it). Only retirement notes remain; don't resurrect it.

title: filler_curation
desc: ✅ curated_filler seizes the junk tail and reshapes it toward the Nightreign roster. One pass owns the filler tail — settled, don't re-litigate. 2026-07-23: foreign-flower + spirit ashes + messmerfire tiers landed; pass complete.

title: Client test coverage → fswap shared
desc: ✅ DONE: the ER Rust client is converged onto the fswap `shared` crate — mock the game INTERFACE, not the process (pure logic → er-logic). The orphaned-er-logic gap from the July architecture review is resolved.

title: DLC boss scaling tiers
desc: ✅ DONE: 23 DLC bosses model-keyed and gen-tested. Remaining is playtest feel only — no code blocker.

title: DLC overworld area_ids
desc: ✅ DONE: interior DLC regions wired and the shared overworld m61 tiles resolved via in-game place-name capture.

title: Client QoL features
desc: ⭐ no_equip_load SHIPPED (weightless SpEffect 20012080) + Bedrock option-name aliases — PENDING in-game verification. (auto_equip split out to its own card — offered to MopWater as an RE/client slice.)

title: Configurable scaling difficulty (hard mode)
desc: 📋 SPEC (Alaric, 2026-07-23): a difficulty option layered on the completion-scaling curve. Approach — COMPRESS the smoothstep and RAISE THE FLOOR: enemies start higher but ramp to the same endpoint, so early game is harder and late game converges to normal. Builds on the regionSphereTargetRanges sphere wire.

title: Placeholder shows the reward name
desc: 📋 The chest/pickup popup says "Archipelago Item", not your actual loot. Dress flag 8852's FMG at pickup from the scout — one shared row = a global entry.

title: Region capstone model (spec)
desc: ✅ SPEC COMPLETE: the Threshold Rule (a fog wall CUTS a region, a key FOLDS it) is written (docs/history/SPEC-region-capstone-model-20260708.md) and its primitives shipped (region-spine + legible-locks Done). Remaining build is absorbed into 'Natural-like progression mode' (Ready).

title: num_regions chain (spec)
desc: Breadcrumb locks arranged into a 1..N chain for a sphere-SCALING gradient. Distinct from 'Natural-like progression mode': that controls progression ORDER; scaling stays spheres-based and is owned here / by completion-scaling. [marquee mode]

title: nex3 archipelago_rs upstream PR
desc: Upstream the Connect-version change so the fork can die. nex3 is the contact. ⚠️ Outreach gets undershot — surface it EARLY, not after the code is perfect.

title: Fuzz findings backlog
desc: Open items from the fuzz runs: warp reachability, trimmed-mode shortage, curated_fill edges.

title: Curated fill + filler_local_pct (spec)
desc: ⭐ The dial for how much of the filler tail stays local vs goes to the multiworld.

title: Global scadutree blessing (spec)
desc: Fragments as a game-wide AP power curve. The crux is persisting the stored level (needs RE).

title: Oops All Legacy Dungeons (spec)
desc: Chain the legacy dungeons by grace-warp and delete the open world.

title: Starting class rando (spec)
desc: 📋 DRAFT — implementation explicitly on hold.

title: Trap items
desc: AP traps (summon bear, warp, freeze…). Mine the Crowd Control mod for a ready-made collection.

title: Physical fog-wall enforcement
desc: Replace the play-region KICK with a baked, flag-gated fog WALL. Parked: real walls need Smithbox.

title: Parriable deathlink
desc: A parry negates an incoming deathlink (riposte reflects it back). Needs the input/anim-read subsystem.

title: Control randomizer
desc: Start gimped; receive dodge-roll, camera, Torrent double-jump as AP items. Client input-mask subsystem, spec only.

title: DLC gear curation
desc: Swap the worst base-game gear 1:1 for the best S/A DLC gear.

title: great_runes_present
desc: Force extra great runes into the num_regions pool beyond the Leyndell gate.

title: Nightreign AP (Hades pattern)
desc: Port the Polycosmos 'Reverse Heat' pattern to Nightreign. Idea only.

title: DS1 AP recon
desc: tathxo/DSAP builds on the MIT Archipelago.Core — worth reading before the next client refactor.

title: Progressive flask grants both axes (intentional)
desc: 📋 TRACKED-INTENTIONAL (not a bug — filed so it stops re-surfacing as one): every Progressive Flask Upgrade grants BOTH a flask charge AND a consumed Sacred Tear (flaskLadder + progressiveGrants) in greenfield/eldenring/features/progressive.py (PROG_FLASK). The original design ALTERNATED rungs (Golden Seeds vs Sacred Tears); switching to both-axes-per-copy was a deliberate change for DLC-ONLY seeds, to catch the player up faster (DLC layers its own Scadutree/Revered economy on top of base flask progression). dlc_only injects 12 copies when no seed/tear checks are kept. Both modes are viable: progressive-on = both-axes (DLC catch-up default); progressive-off = vanilla Golden Seeds + Sacred Tears. Possible future enhancement (low, not blocking): restore the alternating seed/tear schedule as a BASE-GAME option while keeping both-axes for DLC. Already documented in-file; this card is the record of WHY.

title: Restore rune-shop arbitrage (randomize shop costs)
desc: ⭐ Bring back the rune-shop arbitrage — GONE in the current build, Alaric wants it back. A consumable rune (Lord's Rune, ~50k on use) landing in a shop cheaper than its value → buy for ~2k, consume for ~48k (fun). WHY it's gone: gen_data's GOODS_PRICE now derives each rerolled item's price from what it's WORTH (vanilla price → EquipParamGoods.basicPrice → sellValue x10, gen_data.py ~3186-3227), so nothing is ever underpriced. Fix (Alaric) — split pricing by STOCK TYPE: FINITE one-time rows (the shop_rows.tsv AP checks: eventFlag_forStock>0 AND sellQuantity>=1) all get a seed-seeded random cost in [0, 5000] — the fun one-shot flip; INFINITE-stock rows (INFINITE_SHOP_ROWS, sellQuantity -1) stay priced AT COST / at-worth so you can’t infinitely farm the arbitrage. Deterministic from the seed.

title: Add Somberstone Bell Bearing [1] to the presence floor
desc: 🔧 The presence floor (features/presence_floor.py) guarantees 8 of 9 bell bearings but DROPS Somberstone Miner's Bell Bearing [1] — its roster name doesn't resolve in ITEM_CATALOG (the looted [2]-[5] do). CONFIRMED DROP: the Fallingstar Beast at the end of Sellia Crystal Tunnel (m32_08, boss-defeat entry 32080800 in boss_healthbars.py) — a BOSS REWARD, the exact class boss_reward_lots.py already datamines. So [1] fails FMG-name matching (its real GoodsName likely differs from the synthesized 'Somberstone Miner's Bell Bearing [1]', or is the un-numbered first-tier name), but its goods FullID IS derivable as boss 32080800's reward lot. Task: pull that reward goods id via BOSS_REWARD_DEFEAT / the reward lot, then either fix the roster string to the real FMG name OR teach presence_floor to inject a roster item by explicit goods FullID (not just by name). Flip the test pin in test_gf_presence_floor (currently asserts UNRESOLVED == ["Somberstone Miner's Bell Bearing [1]"]). Verify the injected [1] grants + unlocks its somber tier in-game.

title: Boss-reward lots datamine
desc: ✅ 2026-07-21: boss_reward_lots.py + boss_area_regions.tsv derived — the drop-flag→defeat-flag table (BOSS_REWARD_DEFEAT) from common-event args via tools/datamine_boss_reward_lots.py. This is the join source the boss-name description layer (Ready) consumes.

title: Golden Hippopotamus region derived
desc: ✅ 2026-07-21: the Hippo drop (510440) re-homed to Scadu Altus, DERIVED from PlayRegionParam boss-area — replaces the hand override (the GLOBAL_RECOVER edit was dead code; now via FLAG_REGION_OVERRIDE). Whitelisted for the provenance oracle; playtest ground truth.

title: Interior grace-ground from PlayArea volumes
desc: ✅ 2026-07-21: interior-grace ground derived from the map's own PlayArea volumes — fixes the Shadow Keep Main Gate lethal kick. MEASURED_GROUND[72102]=69000 pinned from the in-game kick lines (engine corroboration).

title: TWO play_region id spaces resolved
desc: ⭐⭐⭐ FIXED 2026-07-13: the warp id (graces) ≠ PlayRegionParam//100 (the KICK space). Weeping + ALL DLC locks had NEVER actually enforced under the old x10 join. The grace-tile ↔ param-tile join is the real derivation.

title: Coverage gate is LIVE
desc: ⭐⭐ Now raised from core.post_fill with baseline 0: every location must be DETECTABLE + SUPPRESSED + REGION-CONSISTENT or generation dies. The vanilla drop-suppress leak is now machine-gated, not living on a branch. 🛑 never quarantine to make it green.

title: Vanilla drop-suppress leak — gated
desc: ✅ Mostly SUPERSEDED: the static ItemLotParam blank-list table dissolves both leak classes, and the coverage gate now proves detection/suppression at gen time. Residual = CONTAINED, filler-only (a missed filler, never a stranded run) and tracked as a known issue.

title: Bedrock apworld interop
desc: ⭐⭐ 2026-07-18: the contract exists on er, the client has a TESTED bedrock-interop layer, scope is resolved via the disable-list, and DLC provenance is a non-issue (no matt DLC). Our client drives his apworld with ZERO changes. 🛑 His table derives from matt's itemslots.yaml — never ingest it.

title: Reconciler grant pacing — proven
desc: ✅ 2026-07-15 mass-grant stress test PASSED: an early goal-release dumped ~1-2k checks at once, the client granted ALL of them, NO crash. The burst=2/150ms throttle survived its worst case. Grant VOLUME is proven fine.

title: Start anchor now size-weighted
desc: ⭐ FIXED 2026-07-14: the opening region is size-weighted over BASE regions. Was a uniform 32%→2.3% chance of a sub-80-check DLC-corridor start ("Castle Ensis is tiny").

title: KICK confirmed in-game
desc: ✅ 2026-07-14: the play-region KICK region-lock is confirmed working in-game ("working better than ever"). The remaining in-game plays (save-load latch, reconnect baseline, AP-only payout) are tracked in the In-Progress column.

title: Full Moon Queen region mis-tag
desc: ✅ RESOLVED: the data.py vs boss_data disagreement over Rennala's remembrance region is closed — the sweep gate and the logic now agree.

title: Open-flag collision 76996
desc: ✅ RESOLVED: band flag 76996 == DEATHLINK_KILL_FLAG (every incoming deathlink silently opened Stormveil). The region locks were moved to the 7697x band.

title: Bundle-lock grace reconcile gap
desc: ✅ RESOLVED: grace-only Spelunker torches with no open flag now self-heal a lost grant — the reconciler reconciles region_graces, not just region_open_flags.

title: Vanilla-suppress collected-set fix
desc: ✅ RESOLVED: the re-pickup path reads the server COLLECTED set rather than the live flag, so an already-collected check can't hand back the vanilla item.

title: Reconnect new-seed panic
desc: ✅ RESOLVED: connecting to seedB after seedA without a reload no longer panics — reset_for_new_seed() fires on slot_data change.

title: Underground map view-unlock 82001
desc: ✅ RESOLVED: the underground map now gets fragments 62060–64 AND the view-unlock flag 82001, so the map lights up.

title: num_regions cave-start graces — mooted
desc: ✅ MOOTED by the Roundtable-hub re-root: the chain no longer roots at a Spelunker-torch cave with zero graces, so the graceless-spawn class can't occur.

title: Bedrock playtest — first success
desc: ⭐⭐ 2026-07-13: our client drove a foreign (Bedrock) apworld in-game. Checks fired, goal armed. Proves the client is apworld-agnostic.

title: Boss-reward lots (common.emevd)
desc: ⭐⭐ FIXED 2026-07-12: mini-dungeon boss rewards come from common.emevd $Event(1100/1200/4857), NOT NpcParam (itemLotId_enemy = −1). 6-digit flags decoded to no tile → 37 CHECKS NEVER EXISTED. The map/enemy-collision theory is dead.

title: check_lots works in-game
desc: ✅ 2026-07-12 playtest (client e40f74e): 3744 blanked, 0 missing from the named table, 173 checks registered via flag-poll. The acquisition flag DOES fire on a suppressed placeholder — the one thing no test could reach. Version-mismatch spam gone.

title: Public repo is cloneable
desc: ✅ Dead archipelago_rs gitlink (no .gitmodules entry) removed; anonymous clone verified end-to-end. Every `clone --recurse-submodules` used to die.

title: Shipped yaml declared a game that didn't exist
desc: 🔴→✅ release-v0.2/EldenRing.yaml said `game: EldenRing` but the world is `"Elden Ring"` — a player's FIRST action failed. Nothing caught it because the suite is handed the game name directly and never reads the shipped yaml. Fixed + test_gf_shipping_yaml.py, run SIGHTED in CI.

title: Both repos have CI
desc: ✅ Client = Windows cargo build+test on push to main (THE build gate). Apworld = pytest on a pinned AP 0.6.7 + a `generators` job that fails on crash OR stale committed output. Poll CI; never hand over an unbuilt commit.

title: LOD tile region snap
desc: ⭐ FIXED: LOD2 tile ≠ fine coords, and nearest-neighbour never fails → it confidently returned the WRONG region → silent vanilla pickup.

title: Shop release-gate
desc: ⭐⭐ FIXED: eventFlag_forRelease decides whether a row EXISTS at all. Fix the CHOOSER, not the knob.

title: Guessed region ≠ progression
desc: ⭐⭐ FIXED: HUB quarantine asserted FALSE reachability and killed a live seed. Now DEFAULTED_REGION_APS, and the guard is FLAG-keyed (ap-ids drift).

title: Radahn Festival softlock
desc: ⭐ FIXED: flag 9410 force-set at spawn.

title: Playtest bug batch cleared
desc: ✅ Alaric fixed these in playtest before the readiness sweep: map pieces on connect, Spirit Calling Bell, flask double-grant, Torrent-mountless on region-lock starts. (Older memory entries still flag them 🔴 — those lines are stale.)

title: Check registration (0/1839 tracker)
desc: ✅ Resolved — the all-zero tracker was client-side (empty locationFlags), not a coverage gap. 173 checks registered in the 07-12 playtest.

title: Roundtable-hub re-root
desc: ✅ SHIPPING DEFAULT: Roundtable Hold IS the start hub; one rolled region opens at link-0; Limgrave is a normal rollable/lockable region.

title: Pure-runtime model
desc: ⭐ THE path: vanilla game + apworld + MIT Rust client + a static flag table. No baker, no regulation edit — routes around licensing entirely.

title: Baker + C++ client retired
desc: ✅ Submodules removed, C++ client archived, Rust client is an in-repo submodule, build.ps1 rewritten pure-runtime-only.

title: Semantic test tiers + replay suite
desc: ⭐⭐ Three tiers; 10 *_replay.rs plus tier-A region gates, all CI-gated. This is what makes 'run the gates, don't read the checklist' possible.

title: Contract single source
desc: ⭐ contract.py declares per-key shape/producer/consumer; gen_contract → contract_gen.rs. The options-subdict gap (client reads sd["options"][…]) is landed.

title: DLC region pass + cross-gate fix
desc: ⭐ SHIPPED: ~413 mis-regioned locations corrected, plus the cross-gate FillError fix.

title: Flag-poll new-save defaults
desc: ✅ LANDED: the baseline flag set is persisted once per save, so a fresh character doesn't register phantom checks.

title: Shop rows DERIVED (679 checks)
desc: ⭐⭐ The White Cipher Ring bug cracked it: for a one-time shop item the stock flag IS the obtained flag. Sweeping ShopLineupParam found 110 lost rows. tools/datamine_shop_rows.py → greenfield/shop_rows.tsv. Derivation done; the gen_data wiring has since landed (see Done: 'Wire shop_rows.tsv into gen_data').

title: Oracle tooling (boss / category / tagging)
desc: ⭐ DisplayBossHealthBar EMEVD scan = the authoritative boss set (249); boss-drop datamine via common-event args; location-category audit vs ItemLotParam ground truth; important_locations + missable tagging; unique-key-item singleton guard. ⚠️ The oracles run BLIND without region_map.csv co-located.

title: Arena-grace oracle
desc: ⭐⭐ DERIVED: dist(grace, boss spawn) < 40m from the witchy'd MSBs, unioned with the hand list. Also the 9005810 bonfire-hidden class (distinct from arena graces).

title: Resolved: start-item clobber, great-rune dup, boundary, open-flag gap
desc: ✅ Greenfield start-item (Torch) clobber, great-rune double-grant, the Liurnia/Altus boundary mis-region, and the legacy-dungeon open-flag gap are all closed. Detail lives in git.

title: pool_builder consumables reshape
desc: ⭐ APPLIED: gate S → S+A, rune cap → Golden, Nightreign consumables bucket.

title: Upgrade-curve tooling
desc: ⭐ Smithing stones → FILLER_POOL; the flatten_regular_upgrades knob landed. Replay coverage now exists (see Done: 'Replay guard for upgrade features').

title: Options wizard delivered
desc: ⭐ 70-option surface shipped with a green description gate. SLIMMED to 19 for v0.2 and shipped (see Done: 'Option matrix SLIM v0.2').

title: Linux cross-compile of the client
desc: ✅ The .dll cross-compiles via cargo-xwin (needs disk headroom). Lets the sandbox check the client without Windows.
